task_completion.description: The agent opens the docker-compose.yml file to edit it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., VS Code, nano, vim) is visible displaying the contents of 'docker-compose.yml'.

task_completion.description: The agent adds the required network aliases to the docker-compose.yml file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the docker-compose.yml file, under the networks section for the application service, 'aliases:' is defined with 'db-primary.corp.local' and 'auth-gateway.partner.net'.

task_completion.description: The agent sets the MODE environment variable to PRODUCTION in the docker-compose.yml file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the docker-compose.yml file, under the 'environment:' section, 'MODE: PRODUCTION' or 'MODE=PRODUCTION' is visible.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the volume mount for the logs directory in the docker-compose.yml file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the docker-compose.yml file, under the 'volumes:' section, a mapping from './logs' (or the full absolute path /home/ga/projects/fincore-migration/logs) to '/var/log/fincore/' is visible.

task_completion.description: The agent starts the Docker Compose services.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terminal shows the command 'docker compose up' or 'docker-compose up' being executed, with output indicating that the containers are starting or have started.

task_completion.description: The agent verifies that the application started successfully by checking the log file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terminal or a text editor shows the contents of 'startup_success.log' (located in the logs directory) containing the text 'SYSTEM_READY'.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the application code to bypass the requirements.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening or editing 'app/main.py' to remove the hostname or environment variable checks.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran Docker Compose rather than simulating the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal shows standard Docker Compose build/start logs with colored output and container status messages, not just echoed text.

integrity.description: The startup_success.log file was created by the application, not manually by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no terminal command like 'echo SYSTEM_READY > logs/startup_success.log' or manual editing of the log file to insert the success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is /home/ga/projects/fincore-migration. The application script is app/main.py. The required network aliases are db-primary.corp.local and auth-gateway.partner.net. The required environment variable is MODE=PRODUCTION. The host log directory is /home/ga/projects/fincore-migration/logs, which should be mounted to /var/log/fincore/ in the container. Upon successful startup, the application writes 'SYSTEM_READY' to startup_success.log in the log directory.
